---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  id: blog-posts
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  sort:
    - "date"
    - "title"
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
---
::: {#blog-posts}
:::

## My LinkedIn Posts
```{=html}
<style>
  .linkedin-carousel-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin: 2rem auto;
    max-width: 600px;
  }

  .carousel-btn {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    background: white;
    border: 2px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 50%;
    width: 44px;
    height: 44px;
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    color: #334155;
  }

  .carousel-btn:hover {
    background: #f1f5f9;
    border-color: #94a3b8;
  }

  .carousel-track-container {
    overflow: hidden;
    width: 100%;
    border-radius: 12px;
  }

  .carousel-track {
    display: flex;
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
  }

  .carousel-slide {
    min-width: 100%;
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    background: #fff;
  }

  .carousel-slide iframe {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    border: none;
  }

  .carousel-dots {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-top: 1rem;
  }

  .dot {
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #cbd5e1;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s ease;
  }

  .dot.active {
    background: #334155;
  }
</style>

<div class="linkedin-carousel-wrapper">
  <button class="carousel-btn" onclick="moveCarousel(-1)">&#8249;</button>

  <div style="width: 100%">
    <div class="carousel-track-container">
      <div class="carousel-track" id="linkedinTrack">

        <!-- NEWEST first -->
        <div class="carousel-slide">
          <iframe src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:share:7384206458931879936?collapsed=1" height="570" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
        </div>

        <div class="carousel-slide">
          <iframe src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:share:7233860304227516416?collapsed=1" height="570" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
        </div>

        <!-- OLDEST last -->
        <div class="carousel-slide">
          <iframe src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:share:7231143663710486528?collapsed=1" height="570" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="carousel-dots" id="carouselDots"></div>
  </div>

  <button class="carousel-btn" onclick="moveCarousel(1)">&#8250;</button>
</div>

<script>
  let currentSlide = 0;
  const track = document.getElementById('linkedinTrack');
  const slides = track.querySelectorAll('.carousel-slide');
  const dotsContainer = document.getElementById('carouselDots');

  // Build dots
  slides.forEach((_, i) => {
    const dot = document.createElement('div');
    dot.className = 'dot' + (i === 0 ? ' active' : '');
    dot.onclick = () => goToSlide(i);
    dotsContainer.appendChild(dot);
  });

  function goToSlide(index) {
    currentSlide = index;
    track.style.transform = 'translateX(-' + (currentSlide * 100) + '%)';
    document.querySelectorAll('.dot').forEach((d, i) => {
      d.classList.toggle('active', i === currentSlide);
    });
  }

  function moveCarousel(direction) {
    goToSlide((currentSlide + direction + slides.length) % slides.length);
  }
</script>
```
